title: IGNOU Fresh Admission July 2026 Online Form

sections.title: Set as Preferred Source on Google

content.text: IGNOU UG / PG Fresh Admission July 2026 : Indira Gandhi national open university has started the admission process for the 2026-27 academic session and the last date to apply for ignou fresh admission July 2026 to any ODL or online mode courses is 15 July 2026. Students who want to pursue any course can follow all the procedures on the university’s official web portal ignou.ac.in. IGNOU grants admissions in ug, pg, and diploma courses to all applicants based on merit.
